rationale.root_cause: Model never mentions src/be_vm.c:743 or the FLIP opcode; it incorrectly diagnoses an assert failure in be_baselib.c:26 instead.
rationale.local_fix: Model proposes a change to l_assert in be_baselib.c; the registered patch changes the FLIP case in be_vm.c:743 from '-' to '~'.
rationale.global_fix: Model attributes the failure to missing argument handling in assert and calls to be_top; it does not identify the copy-paste error of using arithmetic negation for bitwise FLIP.
